title: onobrychis saxatilis f. canescens
intro: Onobrychis saxatilis f. canescens, also known as sainfoin or hairy sainfoin, is a plant species in the legume family, characterized by its hairy leaves and stems. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its flavonoid and saponin compounds, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis saxatilis f. canescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, sainfoin is often used as an infusion, tincture, or dried herb, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, coughs, and skin irritations.
